overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a hooded character standing on a wooden raft or dock at a tropical shoreline during dark nighttime. The camera slowly rotates around the stationary character, revealing the ocean, palm trees, and rocky coastline under an overcast greenish sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical beach shoreline with wooden dock

agents.ego_description: standing stationary on a wooden platform, slowly rotating to survey the surrounding tropical coastline and ocean waters

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a small raft or dock where the character stands
calm dark sea with gentle waves lapping against the shore
tall tropical palm trees silhouetted against the dark sky
large dark rock formations and boulders along the coastline
scattered logs and wooden debris washed up on the sandy shore

segments.scene_description: The character stands stationary on a wooden dock or raft at a tropical beach during nighttime. The camera slowly pans clockwise around the character, revealing the calm ocean waters to the left, scattered palm trees in the distance, and rocky cliff formations to the right. The scene is dimly lit with a cool greenish atmospheric tint, and no other characters or movement are present in the environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, clockwise camera rotation around a stationary hooded character on a wooden dock, gradually revealing the surrounding tropical coastline. It begins by focusing on the character against the backdrop of a dimly lit beach under a cool, greenish atmospheric tint. As the camera pans, the view expands to uncover the calm ocean waters to the left and scattered palm trees in the distance. The movement continues to shift toward the right, finally unveiling rugged rocky cliff formations that frame the desolate nighttime environment.
